---
title: "The Rev. William Bright"
---

## The Rev. William Bright

**Dates:** (1824-1901)

### Description

historian, hymnwriter and contributor to <i>MP</i> (1868-70)

### Biography

[ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 2d 1887
- Letter from May 6th 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
